title: Saudi Arabian Crème Fraîche Pancakes
description: A delicate pancake recipe infused with the rich flavors of Arabia, topped with a dollop of crème fraîche and a sprinkle of sugar.

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon saffron threads, soaked in 2 tablespoons hot water

instructions: 1. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together crème fraîche, eggs, melted butter, saffron mixture, and rose water.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
5. Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet or griddle.
6. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and edges start to dry.
7. Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
8. Serve warm with a dollop of crème fraîche and a sprinkle of sugar.
